critical.mandate: Assess all three dimensions: performance, security, reliability
Rate risks: high, medium, low with justification

step.title: Load NFRs
step.action: Read NFRs from PRD or architecture doc

step.title: Performance Assessment
step.action: Response time targets, throughput, resource limits

step.title: Migration Assessment (Brownfield)
step.action: If assessment context is brownfield: evaluate data migration performance, backward compatibility, dual-write latency, legacy API parity, and session continuity
Rate each migration risk dimension: high, medium, low with justification

step.title: Generate Report
step.action: Compile with risk ratings per dimension
